model_policy.boundary: Provider may propose only inside approved schemas/contracts. Backend validates. User sees only approved output.
model_policy.fallback: Deterministic fallback remains mandatory for all provider-backed paths.
model_policy.model_promotion: No model may be promoted to default without explicit Architecture acceptance, runtime QA, fallback behavior, and project-memory update.
model_policy.qwen2_5_3b: Approved local bridge/default experimental model for direct_ollama nutrition explanation provider paths when explicitly enabled.
model_policy.qwen3: Not approved as a bridge/default model. Do not promote without an explicit model-evaluation milestone.
model_policy.qwen3_32b: Research/future premium async candidate only; not approved for normal runtime.

model_provider_policy.boundary: Provider/AI output is non-authoritative. Backend owns facts, constraints, validation, persistence, and deterministic fallback; the user approves consequential actions.
model_provider_policy.fallback: Deterministic fallback remains the default unless an authorized milestone explicitly changes that boundary.
model_provider_policy.model_promotion: No provider or model is promoted by current workflow memory. Promotion requires an explicit milestone, validation, fallback, and Architecture acceptance.
model_provider_policy.qwen2_5_3b: Historical optional experiment only; no current default or product authority is established here.
model_provider_policy.qwen3: Historical research context only; not approved as a current default.
model_provider_policy.qwen3_32b: Historical future-research context only; not approved for normal runtime.

process_doctrine.bug_to_regression_rule: Every real smoke failure becomes automated regression test, diagnostic/coverage test, documented limitation, or backlog item.
complex_backend_quality_gate: Identify the exact failing, missing, or underperforming user path.
Add a failing regression test, diagnostic test, or coverage test where practical.
Confirm the test fails or exposes the gap before implementation.
Apply the smallest safe implementation change.
Re-run the original manual/browser smoke path.
process_doctrine.provider_ai_rule: Provider may propose. Backend validates. User sees only approved output.

risk_model.high: workout generation, catalog selection/scoring, state/persistence, nutrition targets, provider output, recommendations: diagnostic first, failing/coverage test, narrow patch, regression validation, original smoke, Linux/browser smoke, project memory, Architecture acceptance
risk_model.low: docs/typo/isolated helper: normal patch and focused validation
risk_model.medium: deterministic service or bounded integration: light diagnostic, focused test, narrow patch, regression validation, smoke if user-visible

stop_conditions: same bug survives two implementation patches
tests pass but browser smoke fails
Linux smoke fails after Windows green
candidate pools or data shape are unclear
implementation requires broader scope than approved
patch fails to apply because of drift and next step is not obvious
implementation crosses into deferred v2 scope
process_doctrine.v1_v2_scope_rule: Architecture defines v1 acceptance and deferred v2 scope before implementation when a feature could expand.

snapshot_ownership_main_acceptance_artif.canonical_accepted_snapshots: Created from main after Architecture acceptance/merge and named with the accepted main commit hash.
snapshot_ownership_main_acceptance_artif.feature_snapshots: Optional implementation artifacts; not canonical unless explicitly designated.

team_routing_contract.project_memory_note: Project Memory / All Future Agents is not a visible team lane; it is a repo continuity concern every team must respect.

workflow_rules.apply_raw_patches_from_repo_as: Apply raw patches from the repo root using git apply --check ..\<patch>.patch then git apply ..\<patch>.patch.
workflow_rules.long_handoffs_in_code_blocks: Long handoffs must be delivered as one copy/paste-ready code block.
workflow_rules.no_broad_formatters_for_docs_only: For docs-only milestones, do not run broad formatters that can rewrite unrelated application files.
workflow_rules.no_git_add_dot: Do not use git add .; stage explicit files only.
workflow_rules.no_repo_wide_mutating_formatters_for_fea: Use targeted Ruff/Black on touched files only. Use whole-repo checks in non-mutating mode when appropriate.
workflow_rules.phase_separated_delivery: Use medium phases: preflight/branch, implementation/apply, targeted validation, runtime/browser smoke when required, explicit staging review, feature commit/push, Architecture acceptance, merge, merged-main validation, main push, and external snapshot.
workflow_rules.push_separate_phase: Push only after the applicable review, acceptance, validation, and explicit authority.
workflow_rules.run_apply_scripts_from_repo_as: Run temporary apply scripts from the repo root using python ..\<script>.py.
workflow_rules.temporary_apply_artifact_root: system temporary directory or an explicitly authorized external location
workflow_rules.temporary_apply_artifacts_outside_repo: Temporary patches and apply scripts stay outside the repo and are removed after use.
workflow_rules.linux_sync: Optional and task-specific; not automatically coupled to snapshot creation.

recovery_intelligence_v2_qa_seed_matrix_.backend_chat_rule: Backend implements Architecture-provided tasks and reports branch/commit/validation evidence when requested; Backend does not prepare handoff artifacts, QA findings, or QA instructions.

daily_coach_note_recovery_aware_language.scope: add optional RecoveryAwareCoachCopyContract support to deterministic Daily Coach Note Today card copy path
behavior: backward-compatible when no recovery contract is supplied
accepts serialized recovery copy contract dictionaries
adds one bounded recovery-aware sentence only when contract guidance allows it
preserves limited/unavailable caveats through limited-context wording
does not expose internal contract/provider/debug terminology in public Today card text
does not change Daily Next Action selection
non_goals: no provider-generated Daily Coach Note copy
no database schema or migration changes

daily_coach_note_copy_qa_matrix_v1.scope: focused QA/test/documentation matrix for deterministic Daily Coach Note public copy
behavior_verified: no-contract Daily Coach Note behavior remains backward compatible
serialized recovery contract dictionary path remains valid
limited/unavailable recovery context produces cautious public wording
low/moderate/high recovery pressure paths remain bounded
public payload does not expose provider/debug/internal contract terminology
public payload does not expose unsafe medical, injury, overtraining, automatic deload, automatic progression, or unsafe-to-train claims
Daily Next Action fields are not changed by recovery copy
public copy stays deterministic under the current service path
provider calls do not occur in the deterministic Today card matrix path
uncaged_provider_voice_principle: give the model rich deterministic source data
include source facts, confidence, limitations, recovery/training/nutrition indicators, and user context
do not reduce the input to a sanitized paragraph that already sounds like the final answer
do not force the model to choose from approved sentence templates
do not require repeated backend-authored sentence structures
evaluate the output after generation instead of pre-caging the voice
future provider voice should receive raw deterministic backend data, not only backend-written prose summaries
daily_coach_note_copy_qa_matrix_v1.future_provider_qa_risk: repeated-template risk should be evaluated later without forcing provider output into backend-authored sentence banks
non_goals: no database schema or migration changes
no Daily Next Action selection changes

scope: developer-only raw data payload for future Daily Coach Note provider preview
preserves raw source_data sections, source_services, data_completeness, gaps, reason_codes, and limitations
includes backend truth contract, provider voice space, provider input guidance, and forbidden provider authority
boundaries: does not generate Daily Coach Note copy
daily_coach_provider_preview_raw_data_pa.uncaged_provider_voice_principle: Future provider work receives raw deterministic backend data and should not be forced into backend-written sentence banks or repeated backend-authored sentence structures.
